rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference visible ports and features.
Use component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings such as assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid AADL scopes based on the visibility of referenced features.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use visible feature names and data types from the AADL model in AGREE expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid in that scope.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assume/guarantee syntax and validator diagnostics
Model analyst extraction of component structure
